verses.text: Israel commits whoredom with Moab and worships Baal-peor. Peor. They join themselves to idols.
Israel commits whoredom with Moab and worships Baal-peor. Peor. They join themselves to idols.
Israel commits whoredom with Moab and worships Baal-peor. Peor. They join themselves to idols.
God commands the ringleaders be hanged. Judgment. The leaders are punished.
God commands the ringleaders be hanged. Judgment. The leaders are punished.
Phinehas slays an Israelite and the Midianite woman; the plague stays. Phinehas. His zeal halts the wrath.
Phinehas slays an Israelite and the Midianite woman; the plague stays. Phinehas. His zeal halts the wrath.
Phinehas slays an Israelite and the Midianite woman; the plague stays. Phinehas. His zeal halts the wrath.
Twenty-four thousand die in the plague. The toll. Sin's cost is high.
God gives Phinehas a covenant of peace and an everlasting priesthood. Rewarded. Zeal for God is honoured.
God gives Phinehas a covenant of peace and an everlasting priesthood. Rewarded. Zeal for God is honoured.
God gives Phinehas a covenant of peace and an everlasting priesthood. Rewarded. Zeal for God is honoured.
God gives Phinehas a covenant of peace and an everlasting priesthood. Rewarded. Zeal for God is honoured.
The names of the slain pair are recorded. Named. The guilty are marked.
The names of the slain pair are recorded. Named. The guilty are marked.
God bids Israel vex the Midianites for their snare. Vengeance. The tempters are to be judged.
God bids Israel vex the Midianites for their snare. Vengeance. The tempters are to be judged.
